title: Sour Crunchy Cozy Peruvian Avocado Stir-fry
description: This savory dish features tenderized avocados and crunchy dill pickles in a tangy sauce with sous-vide cooking for an authentic Peruvian taste.

ingredients.name: peruvian peppers
ingredients.notes: battered and sous-vide cooked at 150°C for 30 minutes

instructions: Prepare the peruvian peppers by slicing them in half, removing the seeds and membranes, then dusting with salt. Sous-vide cook at 150°C for 30 minutes.
In a small mixing bowl, combine sour cream, lime juice, and a pinch of salt to make the sauce.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Add chopped dill pickles to the pan and sauté until fragrant and slightly softened (about 5-7 minutes).
Add sliced avocados and peruvian peppers to the skillet with their cooking juices, along with some of the prepared sauce from the mixing bowl.
Stir in remaining sauce from the mixing bowl until everything is well combined and heated through. Taste for salt and adjust if needed.
Serve hot or at room temperature as a snack.
